title: CJNG 'Monstruos' Armored Convoy Deploys on Jalisco-Zacatecas Border Near Colotlán — Armed Clash Reported
detail: On Saturday evening, April 18, 2026, a CJNG armed convoy deploying 'Monstruos' — improvised armored vehicles reinforced with steel plating — was reported in the Colotlán municipality area near the Jalisco-Zacatecas state border. The convoy, comprising Monstruos plus at least two additional vehicles, circulated across multiple border-zone municipalities: Colotlán, Chimaltitán, Totatitla, Bolaños, Villa Guerrero, and Santa María de los Ángeles. An armed clash was reported at approximately 7:20 PM local time in Laurel, Tepetongo municipality (Zacatecas), where the convoy crossed from Jalisco. No confirmed casualties or arrests were reported. The Colotlán-Tepetongo corridor sits within El Jardinero's established northern Jalisco-Zacatecas plaza network. Monstruos are improvised armored vehicles — typically pick-up trucks reinforced with steel plating — that CJNG has deployed in Zacatecas cartel warfare since 2021. Their deployment signals military-grade positional activity consistent with the El Jardinero faction's post-fractura-total buildup phase, declared April 11.

media.caption: CJNG Monstruos armored convoy on Jalisco-Zacatecas border near Colotlán, April 18, 2026

title: Day 55: One Week Into CJNG Fractura Total — El Jardinero/El Sapo vs. O3 War Active Across Jalisco, Zacatecas, Colima
detail: Day 55 since El Mencho's killing at Tapalpa, Jalisco (February 22, 2026). One week since El Jardinero and El Sapo formally declared open war on O3 and Los Cuinis (April 11), the first full week of the CJNG 'fractura total' has produced a cascade of security incidents consistent with the anticipated post-Semana Santa violence window: an armed CJNG convoy attacked a Zacatecas police headquarters (April 12, El Jardinero's territory); new mass grave discoveries at Rancho Izaguirre deepened the evidence base for CJNG's decade of atrocities in Jalisco (April 12–14); eight Manzanillo municipal police officers were arrested for leaking real-time C5i intelligence to CJNG via Threema (April 16); and three CJNG gunmen were killed in a joint security pursuit on the Colima-Manzanillo corridor (April 17). O3 retains Grupo Élite and consolidated organizational control of CJNG's financial networks via Los Cuinis. El Jardinero commands multi-state plazas across Jalisco, Nayarit, Zacatecas, Michoacán, and Guerrero, with El Sapo providing critical port logistics depth through Puerto Vallarta. The week produced no reported inter-faction direct combat in the core CJNG heartland, but security analysts assess both factions are in an active buildup phase ahead of anticipated territorial confrontations in Jalisco and Colima. Mexico's World Cup security apparatus — 57 days from the June 11, 2026 opening match — is maintaining heightened posture in Guadalajara despite the fracture escalation.

media.caption: InSight Crime: Analysis of CJNG post-Mencho fracture and succession dynamics
